scripts.dev: concurrently --names "web,api" --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/web -- -- run && npm run test --workspace=apps/api -- -- run
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci --workspace=apps/web && npm run test:ci --workspace=apps/api
